heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 31110 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3111036:701., .Aug. 6, 1956, ch. 976, § 1170 Stat. 1055
